# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
      - /v1/users/*
    upstream_service:
      service_id: user-service
      protocol: http
      host: localhost
      port: 8080
    plugins:
      - { module: rate-limiting, config: { concurrent-requests: 10 } }

routes:
  - name: route2
    paths:
      - /v1/orders/*
    upstream_service:
      service_id: order-service
      protocol: http
      host: localhost
      port: 8081
    plugins:
      - { module: authentication, config: {} }
      - { module: rate-limiting, config: { concurrent-requests: 20 } }

services:
  - id: user-service
    name: User Service
    protocol: http
    host: localhost
    port: 8080

services:
  - id: order-service
    name: Order Service
    protocol: http
    host: localhost
    port: 8081

plugins:
  rate-limiting:
    enabled: true
    config:
      concurrent-requests: 10
      upstream_key: host

plugins:
  authentication:
    enabled: false

listeners:
  - path: /api
    service_id: api-service
    protocol: http
